info.title: TexQtic Tenant API
info.description: Tenant-facing API surface for TexQtic multi-tenant SaaS platform. Includes auth, catalog, cart, AI, and tenant management.

tenantJwt.description: Tenant JWT token obtained from /api/auth/tenant/login or /api/auth/login

tenant_category.description: Canonical tenant identity category. Derived from organizations.org_type. Preferred over legacy tenantType field.

is_white_label.description: Indicates whether the tenant operates as a white-label environment. Derived from organizations.is_white_label.

tenantType.description: Legacy tenant type field. Preserved for backward compatibility. Use tenant_category instead.

tenant_category.description: Canonical tenant identity category. Derived from organizations.org_type. Preferred over legacy type field.

is_white_label.description: Indicates whether the tenant operates as a white-label environment. Derived from organizations.is_white_label.

type.description: Legacy tenant type field. Preserved for backward compatibility. Use tenant_category instead.

post.description: Unified login endpoint. If tenantId provided, attempts tenant login. Otherwise, attempts admin login.

tenantId.description: Optional tenant ID for tenant login

post.description: Login as tenant user. Requires email, password, and tenantId.

get.description: Returns current user profile and tenant details

post.description: Activate a pre-provisioned tenant using an invite token. Users cannot create tenants directly.

get.summary: Get audit logs for current tenant
get.description: Returns audit logs scoped to the current tenant (last 50 entries)

Returns all memberships for the current tenant. Accessible to authenticated tenant members with role OWNER, ADMIN, or MEMBER. VIEWER is denied (403). Tenant boundary additionally enforced by RLS via app.org_id. POST (invite creation) is restricted to OWNER and ADMIN.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid tenant JWT

post.description: Create an invite for a new member. Requires OWNER or ADMIN role.

put.description: Update tenant branding settings (logo, colors). Requires OWNER or ADMIN role.

get.description: List tenant-visible catalog items with optional search and cursor pagination

post.description: Create a new item in the tenant catalog. Tenant scope is derived from JWT claims (D-017-A).

imageUrl.description: Optional image reference URL for the catalog item

post.description: Create a non-binding buyer RFQ for a tenant-visible catalog item. Tenant scope is derived from JWT claims (orgId). The response returns the persisted RFQ object in its live OPEN state.

get.description: List buyer-owned RFQs for the authenticated tenant. Tenant scope is derived from JWT claims (orgId).

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Optional RFQ ID, item name, or SKU search

get.description: Read a single buyer-owned RFQ for the authenticated tenant, including bounded supplier response visibility when present.

post.description: Idempotent cart creation. Returns existing active cart or creates a new one.

get.description: Returns the current user's active cart with all items

200.description: Cart retrieved (or null if no active cart)

post.description: Add item to cart or increment quantity if already present

patch.description: Update cart item quantity (set to 0 to remove)

get.description: Generate strategic AI insights for the tenant platform. Budget-enforced with metering and audit logging.

post.description: Generate negotiation strategy advice. Budget-enforced with metering and audit logging.

get.description: Returns the authenticated tenant's escrow accounts. Tenant scope is derived from JWT claims (orgId) — tenantId is never sent by the client (D-017-A). Balance is NOT included in the list response; use GET /api/tenant/escrows/:escrowId for derived balance (D-020-B). TECS-FBW-003-A (2026-03-07).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of escrow accounts to return

200.description: Escrow accounts list. No balance field (D-020-B).

lifecycleStateKey.description: Human-readable state key e.g. DRAFT | ACTIVE | SETTLED | CLOSED | DISPUTED

401.description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing tenant JWT

post.description: Opens a new escrow account for the authenticated tenant. Tenant scope is derived from JWT claims (D-017-A). D-020-B: balance is always ledger-derived, never stored.

401.description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing tenant JWT

get.summary: List G-022 escalation events for the authenticated tenant (read-only)
get.description: Returns escalation_events rows scoped to the authenticated tenant org. Tenant scope is derived from JWT claims (D-017-A — orgId never sent by client). Optional filters: entityType, entityId, status, limit. Read-only in TECS-FBW-006-A.

401.description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing tenant JWT

post.description: Raise a new escalation event scoped to the authenticated tenant. Tenant scope is derived from JWT claims (D-017-A). TECS-FBW-006-A.

401.description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing tenant JWT

post.summary: Resolve an escalation event for the authenticated tenant
post.description: Resolves an OPEN escalation event within the authenticated tenant scope. Tenant resolve is limited to LEVEL_0 and LEVEL_1 escalations; override remains control-plane only.

401.description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing tenant JWT

404.description: Escalation not found in tenant scope

422.description: Validation error or tenant severity restriction violation

post.summary: Preview a settlement — non-mutating balance check (G-019)
post.description: Checks current escrow ledger balance against the requested settlement amount. Non-mutating — no state changes occur. D-017-A: tenantId is never sent by the client; server derives tenant scope from JWT claims. D-020-B: currentBalance and projectedBalance are always ledger-derived SUM values, never stored server-side. TECS-FBW-004 (2026-03-07).

423.description: ENTITY_FROZEN — trade or escrow is frozen

post.description: Applies a settlement debit to the escrow ledger and transitions trade/escrow state. State-mutating — a successful preview (wouldSucceed=true) is required before this is called (D-020-B). D-017-A: tenantId is never sent by the client; server derives tenant scope from JWT claims. actorType is TENANT_USER for the tenant-plane flow. aiTriggered and HUMAN_CONFIRMED path are excluded from TECS-FBW-004 scope. TECS-FBW-004 (2026-03-07).

referenceId.description: Idempotency key — DUPLICATE_REFERENCE returned if already used for this escrow

actorType.description: TENANT_USER for tenant-plane flow in TECS-FBW-004

409.description: INSUFFICIENT_ESCROW_FUNDS, DUPLICATE_REFERENCE, STATE_MACHINE_DENIED, MAKER_CHECKER_REQUIRED, or TRADE_DISPUTED

423.description: ENTITY_FROZEN — trade or escrow is frozen

post.summary: Create a traceability node (TECS-FBW-015 / G-016 / D-017-A)

batchId.description: Unique batch identifier within the org

nodeType.description: Node type string (normalised to UPPERCASE by server)

get.summary: List traceability nodes for authenticated tenant
Get 1-hop graph neighbors for a traceability node

200.description: Node with outgoing and incoming edges

post.summary: Create a traceability edge linking two nodes (TECS-FBW-015 / G-016 / D-017-A)

edgeType.description: Edge type string (normalised to UPPERCASE by server)

404.description: NOT_FOUND — one or both referenced nodes not found in org

get.summary: List traceability edges for authenticated tenant

post.description: Sends a password-reset email to the registered address.
Consumes a one-time reset token and updates the user password.
Consumes a one-time email verification token.
Re-sends the email verification link. Requires an authenticated session.
Issues a new access token using the HttpOnly refresh token cookie. No request body required.
Clears the refresh token cookie and terminates the session.
Converts the authenticated user's active cart into an order. Tenant scope is derived from JWT claims (D-017-A).

get.description: Returns orders for the authenticated tenant user. Tenant scope is derived from JWT claims (D-017-A).
Returns a single order by ID. Tenant scope enforced by RLS (D-017-A).

patch.description: Updates the status of an order. Tenant scope enforced by RLS (D-017-A).

post.description: Records a debit or credit transaction against an escrow account. Tenant scope is derived from JWT claims (D-017-A). D-020-B: balance is ledger-derived.
Triggers a lifecycle state transition for an escrow account. D-020-B: state machine enforces valid transitions. Tenant scope is derived from JWT claims (D-017-A).

get.description: Returns detail and current ledger balance for an escrow account. D-020-B: balance is always a derived SUM, never stored. Tenant scope enforced by RLS (D-017-A).

Returns trades scoped to the authenticated tenant's org. org scope is derived from JWT — never from the request body or query params. RLS enforces boundary at DB layer. Optional query filters: status, limit, offset. D-017-A: no client-supplied tenant identity is trusted. TECS-FBW-002-B-BE-ROUTE-001 (resolves BLK-FBW-002-B-001).

200.description: Trade list returned — scoped to authenticated org

post.description: Opens a new trade between parties. Tenant scope is derived from JWT claims (D-017-A). G-017.
Triggers a lifecycle state transition for a trade. State machine enforces valid transitions. Tenant scope is derived from JWT claims (D-017-A). G-017.

get.description: Returns all custom domains registered for the authenticated tenant. Tenant scope is derived from JWT claims (D-017-A).

post.description: Registers a new custom domain for the authenticated tenant. Tenant scope is derived from JWT claims (D-017-A).

delete.description: Removes a custom domain registration from the authenticated tenant. Tenant scope enforced by RLS (D-017-A).

get.description: Returns the Digital Product Passport (DPP) graph for a given traceability node. Tenant scope enforced by RLS (D-017-A). G-016.
